name: myhorrorstory
description: Commercial-grade cross-platform horror mystery platform monorepo.

scripts.test:e2e:install: corepack pnpm exec playwright install chromium
scripts.test:e2e: corepack pnpm exec playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:commercial: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm test:api:integration && corepack pnpm test:e2e
scripts.validate: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
